An excellent introduction to doctor-recommended Superfeet shape, Superfeet All-Purpose Cushion insoles utilize a flexible design that hugs your arches and cradles your heels to help your footwear, and you, feel great. Durable Aerospring™ comfort foam delivers heel-to-toe comfort, while the flexible heel cradle provides structure and stability, reducing stress on feet, ankles and knees. Designed to replace the removable liner in athletic footwear. Trim to fit your shoe size.

SUPPORTING YOU, SUPPORTING THE PLANET

Extraordinarily effective insoles for heel pain and plantar fasciitis relief. Superfeet Casual Pain Relief insoles are orthotic inserts that help alleviate common foot and joint ailments like:

  • Plantar fasciitis pain
  • Heel pain
  • High arch pain
  • Knee pain

An upgrade from ordinary inserts, the removable heel stabilizers under the contoured heel cups help personalize your support and get the pain-relieving orthotic shape closer to your foot. Doctor worn and recommended, these orthotics for plantar fasciitis and general foot pain are designed to replace the sockliner in roomy to moderate-fitting dress, work, casual and everyday shoes.
